//: Monorepo: the app lives in frontend/, but this config sits at the repo root so Vercel needs no Root Directory set in the dashboard. Just import the repo and deploy.

rewrites.//: Single-page app: every path serves index.html so a deep link or a refresh doesn't 404 on Vercel's static host.

headers.//: Vite fingerprints these filenames, so they can be cached hard and for ever. index.html deliberately isn't, so a redeploy is picked up immediately.
